issues.description: DSL is completely missing the first effect (End of Your Turn trigger with Donquixote Pirates power condition). Only contains a generic OnPlay trigger that doesn't match card text.
First effect needs condition checking for HasCardOnBoard with Donquixote Pirates type and 6000+ power. Currently just 'Always'.
First effect should activate DON!! cards (likely 'AttachDon' or similar state change), not GiveDon. Action type and target are wrong.
First effect has '[End of Your Turn]' in text but missing duration:'DuringYourTurn' specification
Second effect entirely missing: Opponent's Turn trigger with Once Per Turn activation that adds DON!! from deck when Event is activated

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[End of Your Turn] If you have a {Donquixote Pirates} type Character with 6000 power or more, set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.
[Opponent's Turn] [Once Per Turn] When you activate an Event, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
